# Traverse City Bass Destination Charters

> Smallmouth bass fishing charters on Grand Traverse Bay, Traverse City, Michigan with USCG licensed Captain Butch Derickson.

## About

Traverse City Bass Destination Charters offers guided smallmouth bass fishing trips on Grand Traverse Bay in Traverse City, Michigan. Captain Butch Derickson has 10+ years of experience fishing these waters and holds a USCG captain's license. All trips are fully insured and include all gear, tackle, snacks, and drinks.

## Services

- 4-Hour Bass Fishing Charter — $440 (up to 2 anglers)
- 6-Hour Bass Fishing Charter — $550 (up to 2 anglers)
- 8-Hour Bass Fishing Charter — $660 (up to 2 anglers)

Season runs April through October.

## Contact

- Phone: (231) 883-2200
- Website: https://tcbassdestinationcharters.com
- Booking: https://tcbassdestinationcharters.com/trips
